nodes.label: API view to fetch properties from the REALTOR.ca API
Makes an API call to the DDF® Web API
GET /api/properties/          Full-featured property search using your local Pro
GET /api/mls/properties/map-aggregates/     Returns H3 aggregate cells for low/m
POST /api/mls/properties/ai-summary/     Generates or returns cached AI markdown
Fetches a single property from DDF® API by PropertyKey.     Supports both path-s
GET /api/exclusive-properties/     Only listings with "exclusive" in the FIRST 4
POST /api/upload-pre-conn/     Upload CSV or Excel file with column: listing_id
GET /api/pre-conn-properties/     Returns all properties with category_type = PR
GET /api/lease-properties/      Returns ONLY properties with lease_amount > 0
